scope.target: Approved post-v0.4 release sequencing, release blockers, disposition gates, environment evidence, and evaluation planning
constraints: Do not rewrite the completed predecessor workflow or historical source plan
Do not implement v0.4.2 or v0.5.0 scope in this task
Keep routine downstream upgrades deterministic and model-free by default

steps: Define release blocker and disposition gate semantics
Create bounded v0.4.2 backlog items for patch-compatible correction classes
Classify v0.5.0 blockers and disposition gates
Add a deterministic-first v0.6.0 AI behavior evaluation backlog item
execution.last_completed_step: Revised the active roadmap, indexes, and backlog items with the approved release, disposition, environment, and evaluation gates.
execution.next_action: RGR-002 validates, commits, closes, and merges the roadmap revision.

results.summary: The active roadmap now makes v0.4.2 mandatory and patch-only, blocks v0.5.0 on v0.4.2 completion, elevates TOOL-001 and LANG-001 to blockers, and adds a deterministic-first budgeted model evaluation before v0.6.0 taxonomy work.
tests_run: Git Bash quick gate: 21/21 required checks passed
task JSON and backlog YAML parse
results.residual_risk: macOS execution remains intentionally unverified until the repository owner arranges a separate environment; model token budget remains a future user-approved v0.6.0 decision.
